ListWithQueryParamOptions[T any](opts ...QueryOption) ListOption[T] {\n   297→\treturn func(r *ListRequest[T]) {\n   298→\t\tfor _, opt := range opts {\n   299→\t\t\topt(&r.QueryParams)\n implementations (page token supersedes).\n   313→type OffsetPageParameter interface {\n   314→\tPageParameter\n   315→\tGetOffset() int32\n   316→}\n   317→\n   318→// ListWithParameters constructs a new ListRequest using the page parameters\n   319→// exposed by the provided PageParameter implementation.\n   320→func ListWithParameters[T any](t T, p PageParameter) *ListRequest[T] {\n   321→\topts := []QueryOption{\n   322→\t\tWithLimit(uint64(p.GetLimit())),\n   323→\t\tWithPageToken(p.GetPageToken()),\n   324→\t}\n   325→\n   326→\tif po, ok := p.(OffsetPageParameter); ok {\n   327→\t\topts = append(opts, WithOffset(uint64(po.GetOffset())))\n   328→\t}\n   329→\n   330→\treturn ListWithOptions[T](t, ListWithQueryParamOptions[T](opts...))\n   331→}\n   332→\n   333→// ListWithOptions identify a request predicated by both a revision and a namespace.\n   376→// This is used to identify namespaces and list resources directly beneath them (e.g. flags and segments).\n   377→type NamespaceRequest struct {\n   378→\tReferenceRequest\n   379→\tkey string\n   380→}\n   381→\n   382→// NewNamespace constructs a *NamespaceRequest from the provided key string.\n   383→// Optionally, the target storage revision reference can also be supplied.\n   384→func NewNamespace(key string, opts ...containers.Option[ReferenceRequest]) NamespaceRequest {\n   385→\tp := NamespaceRequest{key: If the underlying key is the empty string, the default namespace (\"default\")\n   394→// is returned instead.\n   395→func (n NamespaceRequest) String() string {\n   396→\treturn n.Namespace()\n   397→}\n   398→\n   399→// Namespace returns the resolved target namespace key string.\n   400→// If the underlying key is the empty string, the default namespace (\"default\")\n   401→// is returned instead.\n   402→func (n NamespaceRequest) Namespace() string {\n   403→\tif n.key == \"\" {\n   404→\t\treturn flipt.DefaultNamespace\n   405→\t}\n   406→\n   407→\treturn n.key\n   408→}\n   409→\n namespace and key separated by a '/'.\n   433→func (p ResourceRequest) String() string {\n   434→\treturn path.Join(p.Namespace(), p.Key)\n   435→}\n   436→\n   437→// IDRequest is used to identify parameters within the enforced boundaries.\n// For example, limit is adjusted to be in the range (0, max].\n// Given the limit is not supplied (0) it is set to the default limit.\nfunc (q *QueryParams) Normalize() {\n\tif q.Limit == 0 {\n\t\tq.Limit = DefaultListLimit\n\t}\n\n\tif q.Limit > MaxListLimit {\n\t\tq.Limit = MaxListLimit\n\t}\n}\n\ntype QueryOption func(p and returns their respective responses.\n   255→func (s *Server) Batch(ctx context.Context, b *rpcevaluation.BatchEvaluationRequest) (*rpcevaluation.BatchEvaluationResponse, error) {\n   256→\tresp := 440→}\n   441→\n   442→func matchesDateTime(c storage.EvaluationConstraint, v string) (bool, error) {\n   443→\tswitch c.Operator {\n   444→\tcase flipt.OpNotPresent:\n   445→\t\treturn 478→\t}\n   479→\n   480→\treturn false, nil\n   481→}\n   482→\n   483→func tryParseDateTime(v string) (time.Time, error) {\n   484→\tif d, err := time.Parse(time.RFC3339, v); err == nil {\n   485→\t\treturn d.UTC(), nil\n   486→\t}\n   487→\n   488→\tif d, err := time.Parse(time.DateOnly, v); err == nil {\n   489→\t\treturn d.UTC(), nil\n   490→\t}\n   491→\n   492→\treturn time.Time{}, parameters within the enforced boundaries.\n// For example, limit is adjusted to be in the range (0, max].\n// Given the limit is not supplied (0) it is set to the default limit.\nfunc (q *QueryParams) Normalize() {\n\tif q.Limit == 0 {\n\t\tq.Limit = DefaultListLimit\n\t}\n\n\tif q.Limit > MaxListLimit {\n\t\tq.Limit = MaxListLimit\n\t}\n}\n\ntype QueryOption func(p *QueryParams)\n\nfunc NewQueryParams(opts ...QueryOption) (params QueryParams) {\n\tfor _, opt := range opts {\n\t\topt(&params)\n\t}\n\n\t// NOTE(georgemac): I wanted to normalize under all circumstances\n\t// However, for legacy reasons the core flag state APIs expect\n\t// the default limit to be == 0. func(*ListRequest[T])\n\n// ListWithQueryParamOptions takes a set of functional options for QueryParam and returns a ListOption\n// which applies them in order on the provided ListRequest.\nfunc ListWithQueryParamOptions[T any](opts ...QueryOption) ListOption[T] {\n\treturn func(r *ListRequest[T]) {\n\t\tfor _, opt := range opts {\n\t\t\topt(&r.QueryParams)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n}\n\n// PageParameter WithOffset(uint64(po.GetOffset())))\n\t}\n\n\treturn ListWithOptions[T](t, ListWithQueryParamOptions[T](opts...))\n}\n\n// ListWithOptions constructs a new ListRequest using the provided ListOption.\nfunc ListWithOptions[T any](t T, opts ...ListOption[T]) *ListRequest[T] {\n\treq := &ListRequest[T]{\n\t\tPredicate: t,\n\t}\n\n\tfor _, opt := range opts {\n\t\topt(req)\n\t}\n\n\treturn ListWithReference(ref string) ListOption[ReferenceRequest] {\n\treturn func(rp *ListRequest[ReferenceRequest]) {\n\t\tif ref != \"\" {\n\t\t\trp.Predicate.Reference = Reference(ref)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n}\n\n// NamespaceRequest is used to identify a request predicated by both a revision and a namespace.\n// This is used to identify namespaces and list resources directly else {\n\t\t\tmetrics.EvaluationErrorsTotal.Add(ctx, 1, metric.WithAttributeSet(attribute.NewSet(namespaceAttr, flagAttr)))\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tmetrics.EvaluationLatency.Record(\n\t\t\tctx,\n\t\t\tfloat64(time.Since(startTime).Nanoseconds())/1e6,\n\t\t\tmetric.WithAttributeSet(\n\t\t\t\tattribute.NewSet(\n\t\t\t\t\tnamespaceAttr,\n\t\t\t\t\tflagAttr,\n\t\t\t\t),\n\t\t\t),\n\t\t)\n\t}()\n\n\tresp = &flipt.EvaluationResponse{\n\t\tRequestId:      r.RequestId,\n\t\tEntityId:       r.EntityId,\n\t\tRequestContext: r.Context,\n\t\tFlagKey:        r.FlagKey,\n\t\tNamespaceKey:   r.NamespaceKey,\n\t}\n\n\tif !flag.Enabled {\n\t\tresp.Match = false\n\t\tresp.Reason = flipt.EvaluationReason_FLAG_DISABLED_EVALUATION_REASON\n\t\treturn resp, nil\n\t}\n\n\trules, err := e.store.GetEvaluationRules(ctx, storage.NewResource(r.NamespaceKey, r.FlagKey))\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\tresp.Reason = flipt.EvaluationReason_ERROR_EVALUATION_REASON\n\t\treturn resp, err\n\t}\n\n\tif len(rules) == 0 {\n\t\te.logger.Debug(\"no rules match\")\n\t\treturn resp, nil\n\t}\n\n\tvar lastRank int32\n\n\t// rule loop\n\tfor _, rule := range rules {\n\t\tif rule.Rank < lastRank {\n\t\t\tresp.Reason = flipt.EvaluationReason_ERROR_EVALUATION_REASON\n\t\t\treturn resp, errs.ErrInvalidf(\"rule rank: %d detected out of order\", rule.Rank)\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tlastRank = rule.Rank\n\n\t\tsegmentKeys := make([]string, 0, len(rule.Segments))\n\t\tsegmentMatches := 0\n\n\t\tfor k, v := range rule.Segments {\n\t\t\tmatched, reason, err := e.matchConstraints(r.Context, v.Constraints, v.MatchType, r.EntityId)\n\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\tresp.Reason = flipt.EvaluationReason_ERROR_EVALUATION_REASON\n\t\t\t\treturn resp, err\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tif matched {\n\t\t\t\te.logger.Debug(reason)\n\t\t\t\tsegmentKeys = append(segmentKeys, k)\n\t\t\t\tsegmentMatches++\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tswitch rule.SegmentOperator {\n\t\tcase flipt.SegmentOperator_OR_SEGMENT_OPERATOR:\n\t\t\tif segmentMatches < 1 {\n\t\t\t\te.logger.Debug(\"did not match ANY segments\")\n\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t}\n\t\tcase flipt.SegmentOperator_AND_SEGMENT_OPERATOR:\n\t\t\tif len(rule.Segments) != segmentMatches {\n\t\t\t\te.logger.Debug(\"did not match ALL segments\")\n\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\n\t\t// For legacy reasons of supporting SegmentKey.\n\t\t// The old EvaluationResponse will return both the SegmentKey, and SegmentKeys.\n\t\t// If there are multiple segmentKeys, the old EvaluationResponse will take the first value\n\t\t// in the segmentKeys slice.\n\t\tif len(segmentKeys) > 0 {\n\t\t\tresp.SegmentKey = segmentKeys[0]\n\t\t\tresp.SegmentKeys = segmentKeys\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tdistributions, err := e.store.GetEvaluationDistributions(ctx, storage.NewID(rule.ID))\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\tresp.Reason = flipt.EvaluationReason_ERROR_EVALUATION_REASON\n\t\t\treturn resp, err\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tvar (\n\t\t\tvalidDistributions []*storage.EvaluationDistribution\n\t\t\tbuckets            []int\n\t\t)\n\n\t\tfor _, d := range distributions {\n\t\t\t// don't include 0% rollouts\n\t\t\tif d.Rollout > 0 {\n\t\t\t\tvalidDistributions = append(validDistributions, d)\n\n\t\t\t\tif buckets == nil {\n\t\t\t\t\tbucket := int(d.Rollout * percentMultiplier)\n\t\t\t\t\tbuckets = append(buckets, bucket)\n\t\t\t\t} else {\n\t\t\t\t\tbucket := buckets[len(buckets)-1] + int(d.Rollout*percentMultiplier)\n\t\t\t\t\tbuckets = append(buckets, bucket)\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\n\t\t// no distributions for rule\n\t\tif len(validDistributions) == 0 {\n\t\t\te.logger.Info(\"no distributions for rule\")\n\t\t\tresp.Match = true\n\t\t\tresp.Reason = flipt.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON\n\t\t\treturn resp, nil\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tvar (\n\t\t\tbucket = crc32Num(r.EntityId, r.FlagKey)\n\t\t\t// sort.SearchInts searches for x in a sorted slice of ints and returns the index\n\t\t\t// as specified by Search. The return value is the index to insert x if x is\n\t\t\t// not present (it could be len(a)).\n\t\t\tindex = sort.SearchInts(buckets, int(bucket)+1)\n\t\t)\n\n\t\t// if index is outside of our existing buckets then it does not match any distribution\n\t\tif index == len(validDistributions) {\n\t\t\tresp.Match = false\n\t\t\te.logger.Debug(\"did not match any distributions\")\n\t\t\treturn resp, nil\n\t\t}\n\n\t\td := validDistributions[index]\n\t\te.logger.Debug(\"matched distribution\", zap.Reflect(\"evaluation_distribution\", d))\n\n\t\tresp.Match = true\n\t\tresp.Value = d.VariantKey\n\t\tresp.Attachment = d.VariantAttachment\n\t\tresp.Reason = flipt.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON\n\t\treturn resp, nil\n\t} // end rule loop\n\n\treturn resp, nil\n}\n\n// matchConstraints is a utility function that will return if all or any constraints have matched for a segment depending\n// on the match type.\nfunc (e *Evaluator) matchConstraints(evalCtx map[string]string, constraints []storage.EvaluationConstraint, segmentMatchType flipt.MatchType, entityId string) (bool, string, error) {\n\tconstraintMatches := 0\n\n\tvar reason string\n\n\tfor _, c := range constraints {\n\t\tv := evalCtx[c.Property]\n\n\t\tvar (\n\t\t\tmatch bool\n\t\t\terr   error\n\t\t)\n\n\t\tswitch c.Type {\n\t\tcase flipt.ComparisonType_STRING_COMPARISON_TYPE:\n\t\t\tmatch = matchesString(c, v)\n\t\tcase flipt.ComparisonType_NUMBER_COMPARISON_TYPE:\n\t\t\tmatch, err = matchesNumber(c, v)\n\t\tcase flipt.ComparisonType_BOOLEAN_COMPARISON_TYPE:\n\t\t\tmatch, err = matchesBool(c, v)\n\t\tcase flipt.ComparisonType_DATETIME_COMPARISON_TYPE:\n\t\t\tmatch, err = matchesDateTime(c, v)\n\t\tcase flipt.ComparisonType_ENTITY_ID_COMPARISON_TYPE:\n\t\t\tmatch = matchesString(c, entityId)\n\t\tdefault:\n\t\t\treturn false, reason, errs.ErrInvalid(\"unknown constraint type\")\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\te.logger.Debug(\"error matching constraint\", zap.String(\"property\", c.Property), zap.Error(err))\n\t\t\t// don't return here because we want to continue to evaluate the other constraints\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tif match {\n\t\t\t// increase the matchCount\n\t\t\tconstraintMatches++\n\n\t\t\tswitch segmentMatchType {\n\t\t\tcase flipt.MatchType_ANY_MATCH_TYPE:\n\t\t\t\t// can short circuit here since we had at least one match\n\t\t\t\tbreak\n\t\t\tdefault:\n\t\t\t\t// keep looping as we need to match all constraints\n\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t} else {\n\t\t\t// no match\n\t\t\tswitch segmentMatchType {\n\t\t\tcase flipt.MatchType_ALL_MATCH_TYPE:\n\t\t\t\t// we can short circuit because we must match all constraints\n\t\t\t\tbreak\n\t\t\tdefault:\n\t\t\t\t// keep looping to see if we match the next constraint\n\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tvar matched = true\n\n\tswitch segmentMatchType {\n\tcase flipt.MatchType_ALL_MATCH_TYPE:\n\t\tif len(constraints) != constraintMatches {\n\t\t\treason = \"did not match ALL constraints\"\n\t\t\tmatched = false\n\t\t}\n\n\tcase flipt.MatchType_ANY_MATCH_TYPE:\n\t\tif len(constraints) > 0 && constraintMatches == 0 {\n\t\t\treason = \"did not match ANY constraints\"\n\t\t\tmatched = false\n\t\t}\n\tdefault:\n\t\treason = fmt.Sprintf(\"unknown match type %d\", segmentMatchType)\n\t\tmatched = false\n\t}\n\n\treturn matched, reason, nil\n}\n\nfunc crc32Num(entityID string, salt string) uint {\n\treturn uint(crc32.ChecksumIEEE([]byte(salt+entityID))) % totalBucketNum\n}\n\nconst (\n\t// totalBucketNum represents how many buckets we can use to determine the consistent hashing\n\t// distribution and rollout\n\ttotalBucketNum uint = 1000\n\n\t// percentMultiplier implies that the multiplier between percentage (100) and totalBucketNum\n\tpercentMultiplier float32 = float32(totalBucketNum) / 100\n)\n\nfunc matchesString(c storage.EvaluationConstraint, v string) bool {\n\tswitch c.Operator {\n\tcase flipt.OpEmpty:\n\t\treturn len(strings.TrimSpace(v)) == 0\n\tcase flipt.OpNotEmpty:\n\t\treturn len(strings.TrimSpace(v)) != 0\n\t}\n\n\tif v == \"\" {\n\t\treturn false\n\t}\n\n\tvalue := c.Value\n\n\tswitch c.Operator {\n\tcase flipt.OpEQ:\n\t\treturn value == v\n\tcase flipt.OpNEQ:\n\t\treturn value != v\n\tcase flipt.OpPrefix:\n\t\treturn strings.HasPrefix(strings.TrimSpace(v), value)\n\tcase flipt.OpSuffix:\n\t\treturn strings.HasSuffix(strings.TrimSpace(v), value)\n\tcase flipt.OpIsOneOf:\n\t\tvalues := []string{}\n\t\tif err := json.Unmarshal([]byte(value), &values); err {\n\t\t\treturn false\n\t\t}\n\t\treturn !slices.Contains(values, v)\n\t}\n\n\treturn false\n}\n\nfunc matchesNumber(c storage.EvaluationConstraint, v string) (bool, error) {\n\tswitch c.Operator == \"\" {\n\t\treturn false, nil\n\t}\n\n\tn, err := strconv.ParseFloat(v, 64)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn false, errs.ErrInvalidf(\"parsing number from %q\", v)\n\t}\n\n\tif c.Operator == c.Value)\n\t\t}\n\t\treturn slices.Contains(values, n), nil\n\t} else if c.Operator == flipt.OpIsNotOneOf {\n\t\tvalues := []float64{}\n\t\tif err := json.Unmarshal([]byte(c.Value), &values); err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn false, errs.ErrInvalidf(\"Invalid value for constraint %q\", c.Value)\n\t\t}\n\t\treturn !slices.Contains(values, n), nil\n\t}\n\n\t// TODO: we should consider parsing this at creation time since it doesn't change and it doesnt make sense to allow invalid constraint values\n\tvalue, err := strconv.ParseFloat(c.Value, 64)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn false, errs.ErrInvalidf(\"parsing number from %q\", c.Value)\n\t}\n\n\tswitch c.Operator {\n\tcase flipt.OpEQ:\n\t\treturn value == n, nil\n\tcase flipt.OpNEQ:\n\t\treturn value != n, nil\n\tcase false, nil\n}\n\nfunc matchesBool(c storage.EvaluationConstraint, v string) (bool, error) {\n\tswitch c.Operator {\n\tcase flipt.OpNotPresent:\n\t\treturn len(strings.TrimSpace(v)) == 0, nil\n\tcase flipt.OpPresent:\n\t\treturn len(strings.TrimSpace(v)) != 0, nil\n\t}\n\n\t// can't parse an empty string\n\tif v == \"\" {\n\t\treturn false, nil\n\t}\n\n\tvalue, err := strconv.ParseBool(v)\n\tif metadata.MD\n\t\texpectVersion string\n\t}{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:     \"does not contain x-flipt-accept-server-version header\",\n\t\t\tmetadata: metadata.MD{},\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"contains valid x-flipt-accept-server-version header with v prefix\",\n\t\t\tmetadata: metadata.MD{\n\t\t\t\t\"x-flipt-accept-server-version\": []string{\"v1.0.0\"},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpectVersion: \"1.0.0\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"contains valid x-flipt-accept-server-version header no prefix\",\n\t\t\tmetadata: metadata.MD{\n\t\t\t\t\"x-flipt-accept-server-version\": flipterrors.ErrInvalid(\"flag fruit/apple rule 1 references unknown segment \\\"unknown\\\"\"),\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tpath: \"testdata/invalid/namespace\",\n\t\t\terr: errors.Join(\n\t\t\t\tvalidation.Error{Message: \"namespace: 2 errors in empty disjunction:\", Location: validation.Location{File: \"features.json\", Line: 1}},\n\t\t\t\tvalidation.Error{Message: \"namespace: conflicting values 1 and \\\"default\\\" (mismatched types int and string)\", Location: validation.Location{File: \"features.json\", Line: 1}},\n\t\t\t\tvalidation.Error{Message: \"namespace: conflicting values 1 and string (mismatched types int and string)\", Location: validation.Location{File: \"features.json\", Line: 1}},\n\t\t\t),\n\t\t},\n\t} {\n\t\tt.Run(test.path, func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\t\tdir, err := fs.Sub(testdata, test.path)\n\t\t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\t\t\t_, err = SnapshotFromFS(zaptest.NewLogger(t), dir)\n\t\t\tif !assert.Equal(t, test.err, err) {\n\t\t\t\tfmt.Println(err)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t})\n\t}\n\n}\n\nfunc TestWalkDocuments(t *testing.T) {\n\tfor _, test := range []struct {\n\t\tpath  string\n\t\tcount int\n\t}{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tpath:  \"testdata/valid/explicit_index\",\n\t\t\tcount: 2,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tpath:  \"testdata/valid/implicit_index\",\n\t\t\tcount: 6,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tpath:  \"testdata/valid/exclude_index\",\n\t\t\tcount: 1,\n\t\t},\n\t} {\n\t\tt.Run(test.path, func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\t\tsrc, err := fs.Sub(testdata, test.path)\n\t\t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\t\t\tvar docs []*ext.Document\n\t\t\trequire.NoError(t, WalkDocuments(zaptest.NewLogger(t), src, func(d *ext.Document) error {\n\t\t\t\tdocs = append(docs, d)\n\t\t\t\treturn nil\n\t\t\t}))\n\n\t\t\tassert.Len(t, docs, test.count)\n\t\t})\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc TestFSWithIndex(t *testing.T) {\n\tfwi, _ := fs.Sub(testdata, \"testdata/valid/explicit_index\")\n\n\tss, err := flipt.ComparisonType_STRING_COMPARISON_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\tNamespaceKey: \"sandbox\",\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tSegmentKey:   \"segment1\",\n\t\t\t\t\tProperty:     \"fizz\",\n\t\t\t\t\tOperator: tc.listError != nil {\n\t\t\t\tassert.EqualError(t, err, tc.listError.Error())\n\t\t\t\treturn\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\t\t\tassert.Len(t, flags.Results, 5)\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, \"5\", flags.NextPageToken)\n\t\t})\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc (fis *FSWithoutIndexSuite) TestGetNamespace() {\n\tt := fis.T()\n\n\ttestCases := []struct {\n\t\tname         string\n\t\tnamespaceKey TestGetEvaluationDistributions() {\n\tt := fis.T()\n\n\ttestCases := []struct {\n\t\tname                string\n\t\tnamespace           string\n\t\tflagKey             string\n\t\texpectedVariantName \"prod-variant\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:                \"Sandbox\",\n\t\t\tnamespace:           \"sandbox\",\n\t\t\tflagKey:             \"sandbox-flag\",\n\t\t\texpectedVariantName: \"sandbox-variant\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:                \"Staging\",\n\t\t\tnamespace:           \"staging\",\n\t\t\tflagKey:             \"staging-flag\",\n\t\t\texpectedVariantName: storage.NewResource(s.namespace, flag.Key))\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tassert.NotEmpty(t, evaluationRules)\n\tassert.Equal(t, 1, len(evaluationRules))\n\n\tassert.Equal(t, rule1.Id, evaluationRules[0].ID)\n\tassert.Equal(t, s.namespace, evaluationRules[0].NamespaceKey)\n\tassert.Equal(t, rule1.FlagKey, evaluationRules[0].FlagKey)\n\n\tassert.Equal(t, firstSegment.Key, evaluationRules[0].Segments[firstSegment.Key].SegmentKey)\n\tassert.Equal(t, firstSegment.MatchType, evaluationRules[0].Segments[firstSegment.Key].MatchType)\n\tassert.Equal(t, rule1.Rank, evaluationRules[0].Rank)\n\tassert.Len(t, evaluationRules[0].Segments[firstSegment.Key].Constraints, 2)\n\n\tassert.Equal(t, secondSegment.Key, evaluationRules[0].Segments[secondSegment.Key].SegmentKey)\n\tassert.Equal(t, secondSegment.MatchType, evaluationRules[0].Segments[secondSegment.Key].MatchType)\n\tassert.Equal(t, rule1.Rank, evaluationRules[0].Rank)\n\tassert.Len(t, evaluationRules[0].Segments[secondSegment.Key].Constraints, 0)\n}\n\nfunc (s *DBTestSuite) TestGetEvaluationDistributions() {\n\tt := s.T()\n\n\tflag, err := err)\n\n\t// variant 1\n\tvariant1, err := s.store.CreateVariant(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateVariantRequest{\n\t\tFlagKey: flag.Key,\n\t\tKey:     \"foo\",\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\t// variant 2\n\tvariant2, err := s.store.CreateVariant(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateVariantRequest{\n\t\tFlagKey:    flag.Key,\n\t\tKey:        \"bar\",\n\t\tAttachment: `{\"key2\":   \"value2\"}`,\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tsegment, err := s.store.CreateSegment(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateSegmentRequest{\n\t\tKey:         t.Name(),\n\t\tName:        \"foo\",\n\t\tDescription: \"bar\",\n\t\tMatchType:   flipt.MatchType_ANY_MATCH_TYPE,\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\t_, err = s.store.CreateConstraint(context.TODO(), \"bar\",\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\trule, err := s.store.CreateRule(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateRuleRequest{\n\t\tFlagKey:    flag.Key,\n\t\tSegmentKey: segment.Key,\n\t\tRank:       1,\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\t// 50/50 distribution\n\t_, err = s.store.CreateDistribution(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateDistributionRequest{\n\t\tFlagKey:   flag.Key,\n\t\tRuleId:    rule.Id,\n\t\tVariantId: variant1.Id,\n\t\tRollout:   50.00,\n\t})\n\n\t// required for MySQL since it only s.stores timestamps to the second and not millisecond granularity\n\ttime.Sleep(1 * variant2.Id,\n\t\tRollout:   50.00,\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tevaluationDistributions, err := s.store.GetEvaluationDistributions(context.TODO(), evaluationDistributions[0].RuleID)\n\tassert.Equal(t, variant1.Id, evaluationDistributions[0].VariantID)\n\tassert.Equal(t, variant1.Key, evaluationDistributions[0].VariantKey)\n\tassert.Equal(t, float32(50.00), evaluationDistributions[0].Rollout)\n\n\tassert.NotEmpty(t, evaluationDistributions[1].ID)\n\tassert.Equal(t, rule.Id, evaluationDistributions[1].RuleID)\n\tassert.Equal(t, TestGetEvaluationDistributions_MaintainOrder() {\n\tt := s.T()\n\n\tflag, err := s.store.CreateFlag(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateFlagRequest{\n\t\tKey:         t.Name(),\n\t\tName:        \"foo\",\n\t\tDescription: \"bar\",\n\t\tEnabled:     true,\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\t// variant 1\n\tvariant1, err := s.store.CreateVariant(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateVariantRequest{\n\t\tFlagKey: flag.Key,\n\t\tKey:     \"foo\",\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\t// variant 2\n\tvariant2, err := s.store.CreateVariant(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateVariantRequest{\n\t\tFlagKey: flag.Key,\n\t\tKey:     \"bar\",\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tsegment, err := s.store.CreateSegment(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateSegmentRequest{\n\t\tKey:         t.Name(),\n\t\tName:        \"foo\",\n\t\tDescription: \"bar\",\n\t\tMatchType:   flipt.MatchType_ANY_MATCH_TYPE,\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\t_, err = s.store.CreateConstraint(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateConstraintRequest{\n\t\tSegmentKey: segment.Key,\n\t\tType:       flipt.ComparisonType_STRING_COMPARISON_TYPE,\n\t\tProperty:   \"foo\",\n\t\tOperator:   \"EQ\",\n\t\tValue:      \"bar\",\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\trule, err := s.store.CreateRule(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateRuleRequest{\n\t\tFlagKey:    flag.Key,\n\t\tSegmentKey: segment.Key,\n\t\tRank:       1,\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\t// 80/20 distribution\n\tdist1, err := s.store.CreateDistribution(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateDistributionRequest{\n\t\tFlagKey:   flag.Key,\n\t\tRuleId:    rule.Id,\n\t\tVariantId: variant1.Id,\n\t\tRollout:   80.00,\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\t// required for MySQL since it only s.stores timestamps to the second and not millisecond granularity\n\ttime.Sleep(1 * time.Second)\n\n\tdist2, err := s.store.CreateDistribution(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateDistributionRequest{\n\t\tFlagKey:   flag.Key,\n\t\tRuleId:    rule.Id,\n\t\tVariantId: variant2.Id,\n\t\tRollout:   20.00,\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tevaluationDistributions, err := s.store.GetEvaluationDistributions(context.TODO(), storage.NewID(rule.Id))\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tassert.Equal(t, 2, len(evaluationDistributions))\n\n\tassert.NotEmpty(t, evaluationDistributions[0].ID)\n\tassert.Equal(t, rule.Id, evaluationDistributions[0].RuleID)\n\tassert.Equal(t, variant1.Id, evaluationDistributions[0].VariantID)\n\tassert.Equal(t, variant1.Key, evaluationDistributions[0].VariantKey)\n\tassert.Equal(t, float32(80.00), evaluationDistributions[0].Rollout)\n\n\tassert.NotEmpty(t, evaluationDistributions[1].ID)\n\tassert.Equal(t, rule.Id, evaluationDistributions[1].RuleID)\n\tassert.Equal(t, variant2.Id, evaluationDistributions[1].VariantID)\n\tassert.Equal(t, variant2.Key, evaluationDistributions[1].VariantKey)\n\tassert.Equal(t, float32(20.00), evaluationDistributions[1].Rollout)\n\n\t// update dist1 with same values\n\t_, err = s.store.UpdateDistribution(context.TODO(), &flipt.UpdateDistributionRequest{\n\t\tId:        dist1.Id,\n\t\tFlagKey:   flag.Key,\n\t\tRuleId:    rule.Id,\n\t\tVariantId: variant1.Id,\n\t\tRollout:   80.00,\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\t// required for MySQL since it only s.stores timestamps to the second and not millisecond granularity\n\ttime.Sleep(1 * time.Second)\n\n\t// update dist2 with same values\n\t_, err = s.store.UpdateDistribution(context.TODO(), &flipt.UpdateDistributionRequest{\n\t\tId:        dist2.Id,\n\t\tFlagKey:   flag.Key,\n\t\tRuleId:    rule.Id,\n\t\tVariantId: variant2.Id,\n\t\tRollout:   20.00,\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tevaluationDistributions, err = s.store.GetEvaluationDistributions(context.TODO(), storage.NewID(rule.Id))\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tassert.Equal(t, 2, len(evaluationDistributions))\n\n\tassert.NotEmpty(t, evaluationDistributions[0].ID)\n\tassert.Equal(t, rule.Id, evaluationDistributions[0].RuleID)\n\tassert.Equal(t, variant1.Id, evaluationDistributions[0].VariantID)\n\tassert.Equal(t, variant1.Key, evaluationDistributions[0].VariantKey)\n\tassert.Equal(t, float32(80.00), evaluationDistributions[0].Rollout)\n\n\tassert.NotEmpty(t, evaluationDistributions[1].ID)\n\tassert.Equal(t, rule.Id, evaluationDistributions[1].RuleID)\n\tassert.Equal(t, variant2.Id, evaluationDistributions[1].VariantID)\n\tassert.Equal(t, variant2.Key, evaluationDistributions[1].VariantKey)\n\tassert.Equal(t, float32(20.00), evaluationDistributions[1].Rollout)\n}\n\nfunc (s *DBTestSuite) TestGetEvaluationRollouts() {\n\tt := s.T()\n\n\tflag, err := s.store.CreateFlag(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateFlagRequest{\n\t\tKey:         t.Name(),\n\t\tName:        \"foo\",\n\t\tDescription: \"bar\",\n\t\tEnabled:     true,\n\t\tType:        flipt.FlagType_BOOLEAN_FLAG_TYPE,\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tsegment, err := s.store.CreateSegment(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateSegmentRequest{\n\t\tKey:         t.Name(),\n\t\tName:        \"foo\",\n\t\tDescription: \"bar\",\n\t\tMatchType:   flipt.MatchType_ANY_MATCH_TYPE,\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\t_, err = s.store.CreateRollout(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateRolloutRequest{\n\t\tFlagKey: flag.Key,\n\t\tRank:    1,\n\t\tRule: &flipt.CreateRolloutRequest_Threshold{\n\t\t\tThreshold: &flipt.RolloutThreshold{\n\t\t\t\tPercentage: 50.0,\n\t\t\t\tValue:      false,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\t_, err = s.store.CreateRollout(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateRolloutRequest{\n\t\tFlagKey: flag.Key,\n\t\tRank:    2,\n\t\tRule: &flipt.CreateRolloutRequest_Segment{\n\t\t\tSegment: &flipt.RolloutSegment{\n\t\t\t\tSegmentKeys: []string{segment.Key},\n\t\t\t\tValue:       true,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tevaluationRollouts, err := s.store.GetEvaluationRollouts(context.TODO(), storage.NewResource(storage.DefaultNamespace, flag.Key))\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tassert.Equal(t, 2, len(evaluationRollouts))\n\n\tassert.Equal(t, \"default\", evaluationRollouts[0].NamespaceKey)\n\tassert.Equal(t, int32(1), evaluationRollouts[0].Rank)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, evaluationRollouts[0].Threshold)\n\tassert.Equal(t, float32(50.0), evaluationRollouts[0].Threshold.Percentage)\n\tassert.False(t, evaluationRollouts[0].Threshold.Value, \"percentage value is false\")\n\n\tassert.Equal(t, \"default\", evaluationRollouts[1].NamespaceKey)\n\tassert.Equal(t, int32(2), evaluationRollouts[1].Rank)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, evaluationRollouts[1].Segment)\n\n\tassert.Contains(t, evaluationRollouts[1].Segment.Segments, segment.Key)\n\tassert.Equal(t, segment.MatchType, evaluationRollouts[1].Segment.Segments[segment.Key].MatchType)\n\n\tassert.True(t, evaluationRollouts[1].Segment.Value, \"segment value is true\")\n}\n\nfunc (s *DBTestSuite) TestGetEvaluationRollouts_NoNamespace() {\n\tt := s.T()\n\n\tflag, err := s.store.CreateFlag(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateFlagRequest{\n\t\tKey:         t.Name(),\n\t\tName:        \"foo\",\n\t\tDescription: \"bar\",\n\t\tEnabled:     true,\n\t\tType:        flipt.FlagType_BOOLEAN_FLAG_TYPE,\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tfirstSegment, err := s.store.CreateSegment(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateSegmentRequest{\n\t\tKey:         t.Name(),\n\t\tName:        \"foo\",\n\t\tDescription: \"bar\",\n\t\tMatchType:   flipt.MatchType_ANY_MATCH_TYPE,\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tsecondSegment, err := s.store.CreateSegment(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateSegmentRequest{\n\t\tKey:         \"another_segment\",\n\t\tName:        \"foo\",\n\t\tDescription: \"bar\",\n\t\tMatchType:   flipt.MatchType_ANY_MATCH_TYPE,\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\t_, err = s.store.CreateConstraint(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateConstraintRequest{\n\t\tSegmentKey: firstSegment.Key,\n\t\tType:       flipt.ComparisonType_STRING_COMPARISON_TYPE,\n\t\tProperty:   \"foo\",\n\t\tOperator:   \"EQ\",\n\t\tValue:      \"bar\",\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\t_, err = s.store.CreateRollout(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateRolloutRequest{\n\t\tFlagKey: flag.Key,\n\t\tRank:    1,\n\t\tRule: &flipt.CreateRolloutRequest_Threshold{\n\t\t\tThreshold: &flipt.RolloutThreshold{\n\t\t\t\tPercentage: 50.0,\n\t\t\t\tValue:      false,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\t_, err = s.store.CreateRollout(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateRolloutRequest{\n\t\tFlagKey: flag.Key,\n\t\tRank:    2,\n\t\tRule: &flipt.CreateRolloutRequest_Segment{\n\t\t\tSegment: &flipt.RolloutSegment{\n\t\t\t\tSegmentKeys:     []string{firstSegment.Key, secondSegment.Key},\n\t\t\t\tSegmentOperator: flipt.SegmentOperator_AND_SEGMENT_OPERATOR,\n\t\t\t\tValue:           true,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tevaluationRollouts, err := s.store.GetEvaluationRollouts(context.TODO(), storage.NewResource(\"\", flag.Key))\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tassert.Equal(t, 2, len(evaluationRollouts))\n\n\tassert.Equal(t, \"default\", evaluationRollouts[0].NamespaceKey)\n\tassert.Equal(t, int32(1), evaluationRollouts[0].Rank)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, evaluationRollouts[0].Threshold)\n\tassert.Equal(t, float32(50.0), evaluationRollouts[0].Threshold.Percentage)\n\tassert.False(t, evaluationRollouts[0].Threshold.Value, \"percentage value is false\")\n\n\tassert.Equal(t, \"default\", evaluationRollouts[1].NamespaceKey)\n\tassert.Equal(t, int32(2), evaluationRollouts[1].Rank)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, evaluationRollouts[1].Segment)\n\n\tassert.Equal(t, firstSegment.Key, evaluationRollouts[1].Segment.Segments[firstSegment.Key].SegmentKey)\n\tassert.Equal(t, flipt.SegmentOperator_AND_SEGMENT_OPERATOR, evaluationRollouts[1].Segment.SegmentOperator)\n\tassert.Len(t, evaluationRollouts[1].Segment.Segments[firstSegment.Key].Constraints, 1)\n\n\tassert.Equal(t, secondSegment.Key, evaluationRollouts[1].Segment.Segments[secondSegment.Key].SegmentKey)\n\tassert.Len(t, evaluationRollouts[1].Segment.Segments[secondSegment.Key].Constraints, 0)\n}\n\nfunc (s *DBTestSuite) TestGetEvaluationRollouts_NonDefaultNamespace() {\n\tt := s.T()\n\n\tflag, err :=   \"foo\",\n\t\tDescription: \"bar\",\n\t\tMatchType:   flipt.MatchType_ANY_MATCH_TYPE,\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\t_, err = s.store.CreateRollout(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateRolloutRequest{\n\t\tFlagKey: flag.Key,\n\t\tRank:    1,\n\t\tRule: &flipt.CreateRolloutRequest_Threshold{\n\t\t\tThreshold: &flipt.RolloutThreshold{\n\t\t\t\tPercentage: 50.0,\n\t\t\t\tValue:      false,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\t_, err = s.store.CreateRollout(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateRolloutRequest{\n\t\tFlagKey: true,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tevaluationRollouts, err := s.store.GetEvaluationRollouts(context.TODO(), storage.NewResource(context.TODO(), storage.DefaultNamespace, evaluationRollouts[0].Threshold.Value, \"percentage value is false\")\n\n\tassert.Equal(t, \"default\", evaluationRollouts[1].NamespaceKey)\n\tassert.Equal(t, int32(2), evaluationRollouts[1].Rank)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, evaluationRollouts[1].Segment)\n\n\tassert.Contains(t, evaluationRollouts[1].Segment.Segments, segment.Key)\n\tassert.Equal(t, segment.MatchType, s.store.CreateFlag(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateFlagRequest{\n\t\tNamespaceKey: s.namespace,\n\t\tKey:          t.Name(),\n\t\tName:         \"foo\",\n\t\tDescription:  \"bar\",\n\t\tEnabled:      true,\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tfirstSegment, err := s.store.CreateSegment(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateSegmentRequest{\n\t\tNamespaceKey: s.namespace,\n\t\tKey:          t.Name(),\n\t\tName:         \"foo\",\n\t\tDescription:  \"bar\",\n\t\tMatchType:    flipt.MatchType_ANY_MATCH_TYPE,\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tsecondSegment, err := s.store.CreateSegment(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateSegmentRequest{\n\t\tNamespaceKey: s.namespace,\n\t\tKey:          \"another_segment\",\n\t\tName:         \"foo\",\n\t\tDescription:  \"bar\",\n\t\tMatchType:    flipt.MatchType_ANY_MATCH_TYPE,\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\t// constraint 1\n\t_, err = s.store.CreateConstraint(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateConstraintRequest{\n\t\tNamespaceKey: s.namespace,\n\t\tSegmentKey:   firstSegment.Key,\n\t\tType:         flipt.ComparisonType_STRING_COMPARISON_TYPE,\n\t\tProperty:     \"foo\",\n\t\tOperator:     \"EQ\",\n\t\tValue:        \"bar\",\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\t// constraint 2\n\t_, err = s.store.CreateConstraint(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateConstraintRequest{\n\t\tNamespaceKey: s.namespace,\n\t\tSegmentKey:   firstSegment.Key,\n\t\tType:         flipt.ComparisonType_STRING_COMPARISON_TYPE,\n\t\tProperty:     \"foz\",\n\t\tOperator:     \"EQ\",\n\t\tValue:        \"baz\",\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\t// rule rank 1\n\trule1, err := s.store.CreateRule(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateRuleRequest{\n\t\tNamespaceKey:    s.namespace,\n\t\tFlagKey:         flag.Key,\n\t\tSegmentOperator: flipt.SegmentOperator_AND_SEGMENT_OPERATOR,\n\t\tSegmentKeys:     []string{firstSegment.Key, secondSegment.Key},\n\t\tRank:            1,\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tevaluationRules, err := s.store.GetEvaluationRules(context.TODO(), storage.NewResource(s.namespace, flag.Key))\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tassert.NotEmpty(t, evaluationRules)\n\tassert.Equal(t, 1, len(evaluationRules))\n\n\tassert.Equal(t, rule1.Id, evaluationRules[0].ID)\n\tassert.Equal(t, s.namespace, evaluationRules[0].NamespaceKey)\n\tassert.Equal(t, rule1.FlagKey, evaluationRules[0].FlagKey)\n\n\tassert.Equal(t, firstSegment.Key, evaluationRules[0].Segments[firstSegment.Key].SegmentKey)\n\tassert.Equal(t, firstSegment.MatchType, evaluationRules[0].Segments[firstSegment.Key].MatchType)\n\tassert.Equal(t, rule1.Rank, evaluationRules[0].Rank)\n\tassert.Len(t, evaluationRules[0].Segments[firstSegment.Key].Constraints, 2)\n\n\tassert.Equal(t, secondSegment.Key, evaluationRules[0].Segments[secondSegment.Key].SegmentKey)\n\tassert.Equal(t, secondSegment.MatchType, evaluationRules[0].Segments[secondSegment.Key].MatchType)\n\tassert.Equal(t, rule1.Rank, evaluationRules[0].Rank)\n\tassert.Len(t, evaluationRules[0].Segments[secondSegment.Key].Constraints, 0)\n}\n\nfunc (s *DBTestSuite) TestGetEvaluationDistributions() {\n\tt := s.T()\n\n\tflag, err := s.store.CreateFlag(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateFlagRequest{\n\t\tKey:         t.Name(),\n\t\tName:        \"foo\",\n\t\tDescription: \"bar\",\n\t\tEnabled:     true,\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\t// variant 1\n\tvariant1, err := s.store.CreateVariant(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateVariantRequest{\n\t\tFlagKey: flag.Key,\n\t\tKey:     \"foo\",\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\t// variant 2\n\tvariant2, err := s.store.CreateVariant(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateVariantRequest{\n\t\tFlagKey:    flag.Key,\n\t\tKey:        \"bar\",\n\t\tAttachment: `{\"key2\":   \"value2\"}`,\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tsegment, err := s.store.CreateSegment(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateSegmentRequest{\n\t\tKey:         t.Name(),\n\t\tName:        \"foo\",\n\t\tDescription: \"bar\",\n\t\tMatchType:   flipt.MatchType_ANY_MATCH_TYPE,\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\t_, err = s.store.CreateConstraint(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateConstraintRequest{\n\t\tSegmentKey: segment.Key,\n\t\tType:       flipt.ComparisonType_STRING_COMPARISON_TYPE,\n\t\tProperty:   \"foo\",\n\t\tOperator:   \"EQ\",\n\t\tValue:      \"bar\",\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\trule, err := s.store.CreateRule(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateRuleRequest{\n\t\tFlagKey:    flag.Key,\n\t\tSegmentKey: segment.Key,\n\t\tRank:       1,\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\t// 50/50 distribution\n\t_, err = s.store.CreateDistribution(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateDistributionRequest{\n\t\tFlagKey:   flag.Key,\n\t\tRuleId:    rule.Id,\n\t\tVariantId: variant1.Id,\n\t\tRollout:   50.00,\n\t})\n\n\t// required for MySQL since it only s.stores timestamps to the second and not millisecond granularity\n\ttime.Sleep(1 * time.Second)\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\t_, err = s.store.CreateDistribution(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateDistributionRequest{\n\t\tFlagKey:   flag.Key,\n\t\tRuleId:    rule.Id,\n\t\tVariantId: variant2.Id,\n\t\tRollout:   50.00,\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tevaluationDistributions, err := s.store.GetEvaluationDistributions(context.TODO(), storage.NewID(rule.Id))\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tassert.Equal(t, 2, len(evaluationDistributions))\n\n\tassert.NotEmpty(t, evaluationDistributions[0].ID)\n\tassert.Equal(t, rule.Id, evaluationDistributions[0].RuleID)\n\tassert.Equal(t, variant1.Id, evaluationDistributions[0].VariantID)\n\tassert.Equal(t, variant1.Key, evaluationDistributions[0].VariantKey)\n\tassert.Equal(t, float32(50.00), evaluationDistributions[0].Rollout)\n\n\tassert.NotEmpty(t, evaluationDistributions[1].ID)\n\tassert.Equal(t, rule.Id, evaluationDistributions[1].RuleID)\n\tassert.Equal(t, variant2.Id, evaluationDistributions[1].VariantID)\n\tassert.Equal(t, variant2.Key, evaluationDistributions[1].VariantKey)\n\tassert.Equal(t, `{\"key2\":\"value2\"}`, evaluationDistributions[1].VariantAttachment)\n\tassert.Equal(t, float32(50.00), evaluationDistributions[1].Rollout)\n}\n\nfunc (s *DBTestSuite) TestGetEvaluationDistributionsNamespace() {\n\tt := TestGetEvaluationDistributions_MaintainOrder() {\n\tt := s.T()\n\n\tflag, err := s.store.CreateFlag(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateFlagRequest{\n\t\tKey:         t.Name(),\n\t\tName:        \"foo\",\n\t\tDescription: \"bar\",\n\t\tEnabled:     true,\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\t// variant 1\n\tvariant1, err := s.store.CreateVariant(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateVariantRequest{\n\t\tFlagKey: flag.Key,\n\t\tKey:     \"foo\",\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\t// variant 2\n\tvariant2, err := s.store.CreateVariant(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateVariantRequest{\n\t\tFlagKey: flag.Key,\n\t\tKey:     \"bar\",\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tsegment, err := s.store.CreateSegment(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateSegmentRequest{\n\t\tKey:         t.Name(),\n\t\tName:        \"foo\",\n\t\tDescription: \"bar\",\n\t\tMatchType:   flipt.MatchType_ANY_MATCH_TYPE,\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\t_, err = s.store.CreateConstraint(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateConstraintRequest{\n\t\tSegmentKey: segment.Key,\n\t\tType:       flipt.ComparisonType_STRING_COMPARISON_TYPE,\n\t\tProperty:   \"foo\",\n\t\tOperator:   \"EQ\",\n\t\tValue:      \"bar\",\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\trule, err := s.store.CreateRule(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateRuleRequest{\n\t\tFlagKey:    flag.Key,\n\t\tSegmentKey: segment.Key,\n\t\tRank:       1,\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\t// 80/20 distribution\n\tdist1, err := s.store.CreateDistribution(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateDistributionRequest{\n\t\tFlagKey:   flag.Key,\n\t\tRuleId:    rule.Id,\n\t\tVariantId: variant1.Id,\n\t\tRollout:   80.00,\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\t// required for MySQL since it only s.stores timestamps to the second and not millisecond granularity\n\ttime.Sleep(1 * time.Second)\n\n\tdist2, err := s.store.CreateDistribution(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateDistributionRequest{\n\t\tFlagKey:   flag.Key,\n\t\tRuleId:    rule.Id,\n\t\tVariantId: variant2.Id,\n\t\tRollout:   20.00,\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, evaluationDistributions[0].Rollout)\n\n\tassert.NotEmpty(t, evaluationDistributions[1].ID)\n\tassert.Equal(t, rule.Id, evaluationDistributions[1].RuleID)\n\tassert.Equal(t, variant2.Id, evaluationDistributions[1].VariantID)\n\tassert.Equal(t, variant2.Key, evaluationDistributions[1].VariantKey)\n\tassert.Equal(t, float32(20.00), evaluationDistributions[1].Rollout)\n\n\t// update dist1 with same values\n\t_, err = s.store.UpdateDistribution(context.TODO(), &flipt.UpdateDistributionRequest{\n\t\tId:        dist1.Id,\n\t\tFlagKey:   flag.Key,\n\t\tRuleId:    rule.Id,\n\t\tVariantId: variant1.Id,\n\t\tRollout:   80.00,\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\t// required for MySQL since it only s.stores timestamps to the second and not millisecond granularity\n\ttime.Sleep(1 * time.Second)\n\n\t// update dist2 with same values\n\t_, err = s.store.UpdateDistribution(context.TODO(), &flipt.UpdateDistributionRequest{\n\t\tId:        dist2.Id,\n\t\tFlagKey:   flag.Key,\n\t\tRuleId:    rule.Id,\n\t\tVariantId: variant2.Id,\n\t\tRollout:   20.00,\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tevaluationDistributions, err = s.store.GetEvaluationDistributions(context.TODO(), storage.NewID(rule.Id))\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tassert.Equal(t, 2, len(evaluationDistributions))\n\n\tassert.NotEmpty(t, {\n\tt := s.T()\n\n\tnamespace := uuid.Must(uuid.NewV4()).String()\n\n\tctx := context.Background()\n\t_, err := s.store.CreateNamespace(ctx, &flipt.CreateNamespaceRequest{\n\t\tKey: namespace,\n\t})\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tvar (\n\t\ttotalFlags = 9\n\t\tpageSize   = uint64(3)\n\t)\n\n\tfor i := 0; i < totalFlags; i++ {\n\t\treq := flipt.CreateFlagRequest{\n\t\t\tNamespaceKey: namespace,\n\t\t\tKey:          fmt.Sprintf(\"flag_%03d\", i),\n\t\t\tName:         \"foo\",\n\t\t\tDescription:  \"bar\",\n\t\t}\n\n\t\t_, err := s.store.CreateFlag(ctx, &req)\n\t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\t\tfor i := 0; i < 2; i++ {\n\t\t\tif i > 0 && s.db.Driver == fliptsql.MySQL {\n\t\t\t\t// required for MySQL since it only s.stores timestamps to the second and not millisecond granularity\n\t\t\t\ttime.Sleep(time.Second)\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t_, err := s.store.CreateVariant(ctx, &flipt.CreateVariantRequest{\n\t\t\t\tNamespaceKey: namespace,\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey:      req.Key,\n\t\t\t\tKey:          fmt.Sprintf(\"variant_%d\", i),\n\t\t\t})\n\t\t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\treq := storage.ListWithOptions(\n\t\tstorage.NewNamespace(namespace),\n\t\tstorage.ListWithQueryParamOptions[storage.NamespaceRequest](\n\t\t\tstorage.WithLimit(pageSize),\n\t\t),\n\t)\n\tresp, err := s.store.ListFlags(ctx, req)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tfound := resp.Results\n\tfor token := resp.NextPageToken; token != \"\"; token = resp.NextPageToken {\n\t\treq.QueryParams.PageToken = token\n\t\tresp, err = s.store.ListFlags(ctx, req)\n\t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\t\tfound = append(found, resp.Results...)\n\t}\n\n\trequire.Len(t, found, totalFlags)\n\n\tfor i := 0; i < totalFlags; i++ {\n\t\tassert.Equal(t, namespace, found[i].NamespaceKey)\n\n\t\texpectedFlag := fmt.Sprintf(\"flag_%03d\", i)\n\t\tassert.Equal(t, expectedFlag, found[i].Key)\n\t\tassert.Equal(t, \"foo\", found[i].Name)\n\t\tassert.Equal(t, \"bar\", found[i].Description)\n\n\t\trequire.Len(t, found[i].Variants, 2)\n\t\tassert.Equal(t, namespace, found[i].Variants[0].NamespaceKey)\n\t\tassert.Equal(t, expectedFlag, found[i].Variants[0].FlagKey)\n\t\tassert.Equal(t, \"variant_0\", found[i].Variants[0].Key)\n\n\t\tassert.Equal(t, namespace, found[i].Variants[1].NamespaceKey)\n\t\tassert.Equal(t, expectedFlag, found[i].Variants[1].FlagKey)\n\t\tassert.Equal(t, \"variant_1\", found[i].Variants[1].Key)\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc (s *DBTestSuite) storage.WithLimit(1), storage.WithOffset(1),\n\t\t),\n\t)\n\tres, err := s.store.ListFlags(context.TODO(), req)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tgot := res.Results\n\tassert.Len(t, got, 1)\n\n\tassert.Equal(t, middle.Key, got[0].Key)\n\n\t// get first (newest) flag\n\treq = storage.ListWithOptions(\n\t\tstorage.NewNamespace(storage.DefaultNamespace),\n\t\tstorage.ListWithQueryParamOptions[storage.NamespaceRequest](\n\t\t\tstorage.WithOrder(storage.OrderDesc), storage.WithLimit(1),\n\t\t),\n\t)\n\tres, err = s.store.ListFlags(context.TODO(), req)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tgot = res.Results\n\tassert.Len(t, got, 1)\n\n\tassert.Equal(t, newest.Key, got[0].Key)\n\n\t// get last (oldest) flag\n\treq = storage.ListWithOptions(\n\t\tstorage.NewNamespace(storage.DefaultNamespace),\n\t\tstorage.ListWithQueryParamOptions[storage.NamespaceRequest](\n\t\t\tstorage.WithOrder(storage.OrderDesc), storage.WithLimit(1), storage.WithOffset(2),\n\t\t),\n\t)\n\tres, err = s.store.ListFlags(context.TODO(), req)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tgot = res.Results\n\tassert.Len(t, got, 1)\n\n\tassert.Equal(t, oldest.Key, got[0].Key)\n\n\t// get all flags\n\treq = storage.ListWithOptions(\n\t\tstorage.NewNamespace(storage.DefaultNamespace),\n\t\tstorage.ListWithQueryParamOptions[storage.NamespaceRequest](\n\t\t\tstorage.WithOrder(storage.OrderDesc),\n\t\t),\n\t)\n\tres, err = s.store.ListFlags(context.TODO(), req)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tgot = res.Results\n\n\tassert.Equal(t, newest.Key, got[0].Key)\n\tassert.Equal(t, middle.Key, got[1].Key)\n\tassert.Equal(t, oldest.Key, got[2].Key)\n}\n\nfunc (s *DBTestSuite) TestListFlagsPagination_LimitWithNextPage() {\n\tt := s.T()\n\n\treqs := []*flipt.CreateFlagRequest{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tKey:         uuid.Must(uuid.NewV4()).String(),\n\t\t\tName:        \"foo\",\n\t\t\tDescription: \"bar\",\n\t\t\tEnabled:     true,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tKey:         uuid.Must(uuid.NewV4()).String(),\n\t\t\tName:        \"foo\",\n\t\t\tDescription: \"bar\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tKey:         uuid.Must(uuid.NewV4()).String(),\n\t\t\tName:        \"foo\",\n\t\t\tDescription: \"bar\",\n\t\t\tEnabled:     true,\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\tfor _, req := range reqs {\n\t\tif s.db.Driver == fliptsql.MySQL {\n\t\t\t// required for MySQL since it only s.stores timestamps to the second and not millisecond granularity\n\t\t\ttime.Sleep(time.Second)\n\t\t}\n\t\t_, err := s.store.CreateFlag(context.TODO(), req)\n\t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\t}\n\n\toldest, middle, newest := reqs[0], reqs[1], reqs[2]\n\n\t// TODO: the ordering (DESC) is required because the default ordering is ASC and we are not clearing the DB between tests\n\t// get newest flag\n\treq := storage.ListWithOptions(\n\t\tstorage.NewNamespace(storage.DefaultNamespace),\n\t\tstorage.ListWithQueryParamOptions[storage.NamespaceRequest](storage.WithOrder(storage.OrderDesc), storage.WithLimit(1)),\n\t)\n\tres, err := s.store.ListFlags(context.TODO(), req)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tgot := res.Results\n\tassert.Len(t, got, 1)\n\tassert.Equal(t, newest.Key, got[0].Key)\n\tassert.NotEmpty(t, res.NextPageToken)\n\n\tpageToken := &common.PageToken{}\n\tpTokenB, err := base64.StdEncoding.DecodeString(res.NextPageToken)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\terr = json.Unmarshal(pTokenB, pageToken)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\t// next page should be the middle flag\n\tassert.Equal(t, middle.Key, pageToken.Key)\n\tassert.NotZero(t, pageToken.Offset)\n\n\treq.QueryParams.PageToken = res.NextPageToken\n\n\t// get middle flag\n\tres, err = s.store.ListFlags(context.TODO(), req)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tgot = res.Results\n\tassert.Len(t, got, 1)\n\tassert.Equal(t, middle.Key, got[0].Key)\n\n\tpTokenB, err = base64.StdEncoding.DecodeString(res.NextPageToken)\n\tassert.NoError(t, err)\n\n\terr = json.Unmarshal(pTokenB, pageToken)\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\t// next page should be the oldest flag\n\tassert.Equal(t, oldest.Key, pageToken.Key)\n\tassert.NotZero(t, pageToken.Offset)\n\n\treq.QueryParams.Limit = 1\n\treq.QueryParams.Order = storage.OrderDesc\n\treq.QueryParams.PageToken = res.NextPageToken\n\n\t// get oldest flag\n\tres, err = s.store.ListFlags(context.TODO(), req)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tgot = res.Results\n\tassert.Len(t, got, 1)\n\tassert.Equal(t, oldest.Key, got[0].Key)\n\n\treq = storage.ListWithOptions(\n\t\tstorage.NewNamespace(storage.DefaultNamespace),\n\t\tstorage.ListWithQueryParamOptions[storage.NamespaceRequest](\n\t\t\tstorage.WithOrder(storage.OrderDesc), storage.WithLimit(3),\n\t\t),\n\t)\n\t// get all flags\n\tres, err = s.store.ListFlags(context.TODO(), req)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tgot = res.Results\n\tassert.Len(t, got, 3)\n\tassert.Equal(t, newest.Key, got[0].Key)\n\tassert.Equal(t, middle.Key, got[1].Key)\n\tassert.Equal(t, oldest.Key, got[2].Key)\n}\n\nfunc (s *DBTestSuite) TestListFlagsPagination_FullWalk() {\n\tt := s.T()\n\n\tnamespace := uuid.Must(uuid.NewV4()).String()\n\n\tctx := context.Background()\n\t_, err := s.store.CreateNamespace(ctx, &flipt.CreateNamespaceRequest{\n\t\tKey: namespace,\n\t})\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tvar (\n\t\ttotalFlags = 9\n\t\tpageSize   = uint64(3)\n\t)\n\n\tfor i := 0; i < totalFlags; i++ {\n\t\treq := flipt.CreateFlagRequest{\n\t\t\tNamespaceKey: namespace,\n\t\t\tKey:          fmt.Sprintf(\"flag_%03d\", i),\n\t\t\tName:         \"foo\",\n\t\t\tDescription:  \"bar\",\n\t\t}\n\n\t\t_, err := s.store.CreateFlag(ctx, &req)\n\t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\t\tfor i := 0; i < 2; i++ {\n\t\t\tif i > 0 && s.db.Driver == fliptsql.MySQL {\n\t\t\t\t// required for MySQL since it only s.stores timestamps to the second and not millisecond granularity\n\t\t\t\ttime.Sleep(time.Second)\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t_, err := s.store.CreateVariant(ctx, &flipt.CreateVariantRequest{\n\t\t\t\tNamespaceKey: namespace,\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey:      req.Key,\n\t\t\t\tKey:          fmt.Sprintf(\"variant_%d\", i),\n\t\t\t})\n\t\t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\treq := storage.ListWithOptions(\n\t\tstorage.NewNamespace(namespace),\n\t\tstorage.ListWithQueryParamOptions[storage.NamespaceRequest](\n\t\t\tstorage.WithLimit(pageSize),\n\t\t),\n\t)\n\tresp, err := s.store.ListFlags(ctx, req)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tfound := resp.Results\n\tfor token := resp.NextPageToken; token != \"\"; token = resp.NextPageToken {\n\t\treq.QueryParams.PageToken = token\n\t\tresp, err = s.store.ListFlags(ctx, req)\n\t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\t\tfound = append(found, resp.Results...)\n\t}\n\n\trequire.Len(t, found, totalFlags)\n\n\tfor i := 0; i < totalFlags; i++ {\n\t\tassert.Equal(t, namespace, found[i].NamespaceKey)\n\n\t\texpectedFlag := fmt.Sprintf(\"flag_%03d\", i)\n\t\tassert.Equal(t, expectedFlag, found[i].Key)\n\t\tassert.Equal(t, \"foo\", found[i].Name)\n\t\tassert.Equal(t, \"bar\", found[i].Description)\n\n\t\trequire.Len(t, found[i].Variants, 2)\n\t\tassert.Equal(t, namespace, found[i].Variants[0].NamespaceKey)\n\t\tassert.Equal(t, expectedFlag, found[i].Variants[0].FlagKey)\n\t\tassert.Equal(t, \"variant_0\", found[i].Variants[0].Key)\n\n\t\tassert.Equal(t, namespace, found[i].Variants[1].NamespaceKey)\n\t\tassert.Equal(t, expectedFlag, found[i].Variants[1].FlagKey)\n\t\tassert.Equal(t, \"variant_1\", found[i].Variants[1].Key)\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc (s *DBTestSuite) TestCreateFlag() {\n\tt := s.T()\n\n\tflag, err := s.store.CreateFlag(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateFlagRequest{\n\t\tKey:         t.Name(),\n\t\tName:        \"foo\",\n\t\tDescription: TestCreateVariant() {\n\tt := s.T()\n\n\tflag, err := s.store.CreateFlag(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateFlagRequest{\n\t\tKey:         t.Name(),\n\t\tName:        \"foo\",\n\t\tDescription: &flipt.CreateVariantRequest{\n\t\tFlagKey:     flag.Key,\n\t\tKey:         t.Name(),\n\t\tName:        \"foo\",\n\t\tDescription: \"bar\",\n\t\tAttachment:  attachment,\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, variant)\n\n\tassert.NotZero(t, variant.Id)\n\tassert.Equal(t, storage.DefaultNamespace, variant.NamespaceKey)\n\tassert.Equal(t, flag.Key, variant.FlagKey)\n\tassert.Equal(t, true,\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, flag)\n\n\tvariant, err := s.store.CreateVariant(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateVariantRequest{\n\t\tNamespaceKey: s.namespace,\n\t\tFlagKey:      flag.Key,\n\t\tKey:          \"foo\",\n\t\tName:         \"foo\",\n\t\tDescription:  \"bar\",\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, variant)\n\n\t// try to create another variant t.Name()))\n}\n\nfunc (s *DBTestSuite) TestCreateVariant_DuplicateKey_DifferentFlag() {\n\tt := s.T()\n\n\tflag1, err := s.store.CreateFlag(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateFlagRequest{\n\t\tKey:     true,\n\t\t})\n\n\t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\t\tassert.NotNil(t, flag)\n\n\t\tattachment := `{\"key\":\"value\"}`\n\t\tvariant, err := s.store.CreateVariant(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateVariantRequest{\n\t\t\tNamespaceKey: namespace,\n\t\t\tFlagKey:      flag.Key,\n\t\t\tKey:          t.Name(),\n\t\t\tName:         \"foo\",\n\t\t\tDescription: variant.UpdatedAt.Seconds)\n\t}\n\n\t// get the default namespaced flag\n\tflag, err := s.store.GetFlag(context.TODO(), storage.NewResource(storage.DefaultNamespace, t.Name()))\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, {\n\t\treqs := []*flipt.CreateFlagRequest{\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tKey:     uuid.Must(uuid.NewV4()).String(),\n\t\t\t\tName:    fmt.Sprintf(\"foo_%d\", i),\n\t\t\t\tEnabled: true,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tfor _, req := range reqs {\n\t\t\tf, err := s.store.CreateFlag(context.TODO(), req)\n\t\t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\t\t\tassert.NotNil(t, f)\n\n\t\t\tfor j := 0; j < 10; {\n\tt := s.T()\n\n\tnamespace := uuid.Must(uuid.NewV4()).String()\n\n\tctx := context.Background()\n\t_, err := s.store.CreateNamespace(ctx, &flipt.CreateNamespaceRequest{\n\t\tKey: flipt.CreateFlagRequest{\n\t\t\tNamespaceKey: namespace,\n\t\t\tKey:          fmt.Sprintf(\"flag_%03d\", i),\n\t\t\tName:         \"foo\",\n\t\t\tDescription:  \"bar\",\n\t\t}\n\n\t\t_, err := found[i].Variants[1].NamespaceKey)\n\t\tassert.Equal(t, expectedFlag, found[i].Variants[1].FlagKey)\n\t\tassert.Equal(t, \"variant_1\", found[i].Variants[1].Key)\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc (s *DBTestSuite) TestCreateVariant() {\n\tt := s.T()\n\n\tflag, err := s.store.CreateFlag(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateFlagRequest{\n\t\tKey:         t.Name(),\n\t\tName:        \"foo\",\n\t\tDescription: \"bar\",\n\t\tEnabled:     true,\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, flag)\n\n\tattachment := `{\"key\":\"value\"}`\n\tvariant, err := s.store.CreateVariant(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateVariantRequest{\n\t\tFlagKey:     flag.Key,\n\t\tKey:         t.Name(),\n\t\tName:        \"foo\",\n\t\tDescription: \"bar\",\n\t\tAttachment:  attachment,\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, variant)\n\n\tassert.NotZero(t, variant.Id)\n\tassert.Equal(t, storage.DefaultNamespace, variant.NamespaceKey)\n\tassert.Equal(t, flag.Key, variant.FlagKey)\n\tassert.Equal(t, t.Name(), variant.Key)\n\tassert.Equal(t, \"foo\", variant.Name)\n\tassert.Equal(t, \"bar\", variant.Description)\n\tassert.Equal(t, attachment, variant.Attachment)\n\tassert.NotZero(t, variant.CreatedAt)\n\tassert.Equal(t, variant.CreatedAt.Seconds, variant.UpdatedAt.Seconds)\n\n\t// get the flag again\n\tflag, err = s.store.GetFlag(context.TODO(), storage.NewResource(context.TODO(), storage.DefaultNamespace, flag.Key))\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, flag)\n\n\tassert.Len(t, flag.Variants, 1)\n}\n\nfunc (s *DBTestSuite)        uuid.Must(uuid.NewV4()).String(),\n\t\t\tName:        \"foo\",\n\t\t\tDescription: \"bar\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tKey:         uuid.Must(uuid.NewV4()).String(),\n\t\t\tName:        \"foo\",\n\t\t\tDescription: \"bar\",\n\t\t\tEnabled:     true,\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\tfor _, req := range reqs {\n\t\tif s.db.Driver == fliptsql.MySQL {\n\t\t\t// required for MySQL since it only s.stores storage.WithLimit(1)),\n\t)\n\tres, err := s.store.ListFlags(context.TODO(), req)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tgot := res.Results\n\tassert.Len(t, got, 1)\n\tassert.Equal(t, newest.Key, got[0].Key)\n\tassert.NotEmpty(t, res.NextPageToken)\n\n\tpageToken := &common.PageToken{}\n\tpTokenB, err := base64.StdEncoding.DecodeString(res.NextPageToken)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\terr = json.Unmarshal(pTokenB, pageToken)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\t// next page should be the middle flag\n\tassert.Equal(t, middle.Key, pageToken.Key)\n\tassert.NotZero(t, pageToken.Offset)\n\n\treq.QueryParams.PageToken = res.NextPageToken\n\n\t// get middle flag\n\tres, err = s.store.ListFlags(context.TODO(), req)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tgot = res.Results\n\tassert.Len(t, got, 1)\n\tassert.Equal(t, middle.Key, got[0].Key)\n\n\tpTokenB, err = base64.StdEncoding.DecodeString(res.NextPageToken)\n\tassert.NoError(t, err)\n\n\terr = json.Unmarshal(pTokenB, pageToken)\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\t// next page should be the oldest flag\n\tassert.Equal(t, oldest.Key, pageToken.Key)\n\tassert.NotZero(t, pageToken.Offset)\n\n\treq.QueryParams.Limit = 1\n\treq.QueryParams.Order = storage.OrderDesc\n\treq.QueryParams.PageToken = res.NextPageToken\n\n\t// get oldest flag\n\tres, err = s.store.ListFlags(context.TODO(), req)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tgot = res.Results\n\tassert.Len(t, got, 1)\n\tassert.Equal(t, oldest.Key, got[0].Key)\n\n\treq = {\n\tt := s.T()\n\n\tnamespace := uuid.Must(uuid.NewV4()).String()\n\n\tctx := context.Background()\n\t_, err := s.store.CreateNamespace(ctx, &flipt.CreateNamespaceRequest{\n\t\tKey: namespace,\n\t})\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tvar (\n\t\ttotalFlags = 9\n\t\tpageSize   = uint64(3)\n\t)\n\n\tfor i := 0; i < totalFlags; i++ {\n\t\treq := flipt.CreateFlagRequest{\n\t\t\tNamespaceKey: namespace,\n\t\t\tKey:          fmt.Sprintf(\"flag_%03d\", i),\n\t\t\tName:         \"foo\",\n\t\t\tDescription:  \"bar\",\n\t\t}\n\n\t\t_, err := s.store.CreateFlag(ctx, &req)\n\t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\t\tfor i := 0; i < 2; i++ {\n\t\t\tif i > 0 && s.db.Driver == fliptsql.MySQL {\n\t\t\t\t// required for MySQL since it only s.stores timestamps to the second and not millisecond granularity\n\t\t\t\ttime.Sleep(time.Second)\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t_, err := s.store.CreateVariant(ctx, &flipt.CreateVariantRequest{\n\t\t\t\tNamespaceKey: namespace,\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey:      req.Key,\n\t\t\t\tKey:          fmt.Sprintf(\"variant_%d\", i),\n\t\t\t})\n\t\t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\treq := storage.ListWithOptions(\n\t\tstorage.NewNamespace(namespace),\n\t\tstorage.ListWithQueryParamOptions[storage.NamespaceRequest](\n\t\t\tstorage.WithLimit(pageSize),\n\t\t),\n\t)\n\tresp, err := s.store.ListFlags(ctx, req)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tfound := resp.Results\n\tfor token := resp.NextPageToken; token != \"\"; token = resp.NextPageToken {\n\t\treq.QueryParams.PageToken = token\n\t\tresp, err = s.store.ListFlags(ctx, req)\n\t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\t\tfound = append(found, resp.Results...)\n\t}\n\n\trequire.Len(t, found, totalFlags)\n\n\tfor i := 0; i < totalFlags; i++ {\n\t\tassert.Equal(t, namespace, found[i].NamespaceKey)\n\n\t\texpectedFlag := fmt.Sprintf(\"flag_%03d\", i)\n\t\tassert.Equal(t, expectedFlag, found[i].Key)\n\t\tassert.Equal(t, \"foo\", found[i].Name)\n\t\tassert.Equal(t, \"bar\", found[i].Description)\n\n\t\trequire.Len(t, found[i].Variants, 2)\n\t\tassert.Equal(t, namespace, found[i].Variants[0].NamespaceKey)\n\t\tassert.Equal(t, expectedFlag, found[i].Variants[0].FlagKey)\n\t\tassert.Equal(t, \"variant_0\", found[i].Variants[0].Key)\n\n\t\tassert.Equal(t, namespace, found[i].Variants[1].NamespaceKey)\n\t\tassert.Equal(t, expectedFlag, found[i].Variants[1].FlagKey)\n\t\tassert.Equal(t, \"variant_1\", found[i].Variants[1].Key)\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc (s *DBTestSuite) storage.WithLimit(1)),\n\t)\n\tres, err := s.store.ListFlags(context.TODO(), req)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tgot := res.Results\n\tassert.Len(t, got, 1)\n\tassert.Equal(t, newest.Key, got[0].Key)\n\tassert.NotEmpty(t, res.NextPageToken)\n\n\tpageToken := &common.PageToken{}\n\tpTokenB, err := base64.StdEncoding.DecodeString(res.NextPageToken)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\terr = json.Unmarshal(pTokenB, pageToken)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\t// next page should be the middle flag\n\tassert.Equal(t, middle.Key, pageToken.Key)\n\tassert.NotZero(t, pageToken.Offset)\n\n\treq.QueryParams.PageToken = res.NextPageToken\n\n\t// get middle flag\n\tres, err = s.store.ListFlags(context.TODO(), req)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tgot = res.Results\n\tassert.Len(t, got, 1)\n\tassert.Equal(t, middle.Key, got[0].Key)\n\n\tpTokenB, err = base64.StdEncoding.DecodeString(res.NextPageToken)\n\tassert.NoError(t, err)\n\n\terr = json.Unmarshal(pTokenB, pageToken)\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\t// next page should be the oldest flag\n\tassert.Equal(t, oldest.Key, pageToken.Key)\n\tassert.NotZero(t, pageToken.Offset)\n\n\treq.QueryParams.Limit = 1\n\treq.QueryParams.Order = storage.OrderDesc\n\treq.QueryParams.PageToken = res.NextPageToken\n\n\t// get oldest flag\n\tres, err = s.store.ListFlags(context.TODO(), req)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tgot = res.Results\n\tassert.Len(t, got, 1)\n\tassert.Equal(t, oldest.Key, got[0].Key)\n\n\treq = storage.ListWithOptions(\n\t\tstorage.NewNamespace(storage.DefaultNamespace),\n\t\tstorage.ListWithQueryParamOptions[storage.NamespaceRequest](\n\t\t\tstorage.WithOrder(storage.OrderDesc), storage.WithLimit(3),\n\t\t),\n\t)\n\t// get all flags\n\tres, err = s.store.ListFlags(context.TODO(), req)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tgot = res.Results\n\tassert.Len(t, got, 3)\n\tassert.Equal(t, newest.Key, got[0].Key)\n\tassert.Equal(t, middle.Key, got[1].Key)\n\tassert.Equal(t, oldest.Key, got[2].Key)\n}\n\nfunc (s *DBTestSuite) TestListFlagsPagination_FullWalk() {\n\tt := s.T()\n\n\tnamespace := uuid.Must(uuid.NewV4()).String()\n\n\tctx := context.Background()\n\t_, err := s.store.CreateNamespace(ctx, &flipt.CreateNamespaceRequest{\n\t\tKey: namespace,\n\t})\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tvar (\n\t\ttotalFlags = 9\n\t\tpageSize   = uint64(3)\n\t)\n\n\tfor i := 0; i < totalFlags; i++ {\n\t\treq := flipt.CreateFlagRequest{\n\t\t\tNamespaceKey: namespace,\n\t\t\tKey:          fmt.Sprintf(\"flag_%03d\", i),\n\t\t\tName:         \"foo\",\n\t\t\tDescription:  \"bar\",\n\t\t}\n\n\t\t_, err := s.store.CreateFlag(ctx, &req)\n\t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\t\tfor i := 0; i < 2; i++ {\n\t\t\tif i > 0 && s.db.Driver == fliptsql.MySQL {\n\t\t\t\t// required for MySQL since it only s.stores timestamps to the second and not millisecond granularity\n\t\t\t\ttime.Sleep(time.Second)\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t_, err := s.store.CreateVariant(ctx, &flipt.CreateVariantRequest{\n\t\t\t\tNamespaceKey: namespace,\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey:      req.Key,\n\t\t\t\tKey:          fmt.Sprintf(\"variant_%d\", i),\n\t\t\t})\n\t\t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\treq := storage.ListWithOptions(\n\t\tstorage.NewNamespace(namespace),\n\t\tstorage.ListWithQueryParamOptions[storage.NamespaceRequest](\n\t\t\tstorage.WithLimit(pageSize),\n\t\t),\n\t)\n\tresp, err := s.store.ListFlags(ctx, req)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tfound := resp.Results\n\tfor token := resp.NextPageToken; token != \"\"; token = resp.NextPageToken {\n\t\treq.QueryParams.PageToken = token\n\t\tresp, err = s.store.ListFlags(ctx, req)\n\t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\t\tfound = append(found, resp.Results...)\n\t}\n\n\trequire.Len(t, found, totalFlags)\n\n\tfor i := 0; i < totalFlags; i++ {\n\t\tassert.Equal(t, namespace, found[i].NamespaceKey)\n\n\t\texpectedFlag := fmt.Sprintf(\"flag_%03d\", i)\n\t\tassert.Equal(t, expectedFlag, found[i].Key)\n\t\tassert.Equal(t, \"foo\", found[i].Name)\n\t\tassert.Equal(t, \"bar\", found[i].Description)\n\n\t\trequire.Len(t, found[i].Variants, 2)\n\t\tassert.Equal(t, namespace, found[i].Variants[0].NamespaceKey)\n\t\tassert.Equal(t, expectedFlag, found[i].Variants[0].FlagKey)\n\t\tassert.Equal(t, \"variant_0\", found[i].Variants[0].Key)\n\n\t\tassert.Equal(t, namespace, found[i].Variants[1].NamespaceKey)\n\t\tassert.Equal(t, expectedFlag, found[i].Variants[1].FlagKey)\n\t\tassert.Equal(t, \"variant_1\", found[i].Variants[1].Key)\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc (s *DBTestSuite) TestCreateVariant() {\n\tt := s.T()\n\n\tflag, err := s.store.CreateFlag(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateFlagRequest{\n\t\tKey:         t.Name(),\n\t\tName:        \"foo\",\n\t\tDescription: err)\n\t}\n\n\tres, err := s.store.ListRollouts(context.TODO(), storage.ListWithOptions(\n\t\tstorage.NewResource(storage.DefaultNamespace, flag.Key),\n\t\tstorage.ListWithQueryParamOptions[storage.ResourceRequest](storage.WithLimit(1), storage.WithOffset(1)),\n\t))\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tgot := res.Results\n\tassert.Len(t, got, 1)\n}\n\nfunc (s *DBTestSuite) TestListRolloutsPagination_LimitWithNextPage() {\n\tt := s.T()\n\n\tflag, err := s.store.CreateFlag(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateFlagRequest{\n\t\tKey:         t.Name(),\n\t\tName:        \"foo\",\n\t\tDescription: \"bar\",\n\t\tEnabled:     true,\n\t\tType:        flipt.FlagType_BOOLEAN_FLAG_TYPE,\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, flag)\n\n\treqs := []*flipt.CreateRolloutRequest{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tFlagKey: flag.Key,\n\t\t\tRank:    1,\n\t\t\tRule: &flipt.CreateRolloutRequest_Threshold{\n\t\t\t\tThreshold: &flipt.RolloutThreshold{\n\t\t\t\t\tValue:      true,\n\t\t\t\t\tPercentage: 40,\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tFlagKey: flag.Key,\n\t\t\tRank:    2,\n\t\t\tRule: &flipt.CreateRolloutRequest_Threshold{\n\t\t\t\tThreshold: &flipt.RolloutThreshold{\n\t\t\t\t\tValue:      true,\n\t\t\t\t\tPercentage: 80.2,\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\tfor _, req := range reqs {\n\t\t_, err := s.store.CreateRollout(context.TODO(), req)\n\t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\t}\n\n\t// TODO: the ordering (DESC) is required because the default ordering is ASC and we are not clearing the DB between tests\n\topts := []storage.QueryOption{storage.WithOrder(storage.OrderDesc), storage.WithLimit(1)}\n\n\tres, err := s.store.ListRollouts(context.TODO(),\n\t\tstorage.ListWithOptions(\n\t\t\tstorage.NewResource(storage.DefaultNamespace, flag.Key),\n\t\t\tstorage.ListWithQueryParamOptions[storage.ResourceRequest](opts...),\n\t\t),\n\t)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tgot := res.Results\n\tassert.Len(t, got, 1)\n\tassert.Equal(t, reqs[1].Rank, got[0].Rank)\n\tassert.NotEmpty(t, res.NextPageToken)\n\n\tpageToken := &common.PageToken{}\n\tpTokenB, err := base64.StdEncoding.DecodeString(res.NextPageToken)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\terr = json.Unmarshal(pTokenB, pageToken)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tassert.NotEmpty(t, pageToken.Key)\n\tassert.Equal(t, uint64(1), pageToken.Offset)\n\n\topts = append(opts, storage.WithPageToken(res.NextPageToken))\n\n\tres, err = s.store.ListRollouts(context.TODO(),\n\t\tstorage.ListWithOptions(\n\t\t\tstorage.NewResource(storage.DefaultNamespace, flag.Key),\n\t\t\tstorage.ListWithQueryParamOptions[storage.ResourceRequest](opts...),\n\t\t),\n\t)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tgot = res.Results\n\tassert.Len(t, got, 1)\n\tassert.Equal(t, reqs[0].Rank, got[0].Rank)\n}\n\nfunc (s *DBTestSuite) TestCreateRollout_InvalidRolloutType() {\n\tt := s.T()\n\n\t_, err := s.store.CreateRollout(context.TODO(), (s *DBTestSuite) TestCreateRolloutNamespace_FlagNotFound() {\n\tt := s.T()\n\n\t_, err := s.store.CreateRollout(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateRolloutRequest{\n\t\tNamespaceKey: s.namespace,\n\t\tFlagKey:      \"foo\",\n\t\tRank:         1,\n\t\tRule: &flipt.CreateRolloutRequest_Threshold{\n\t\t\tThreshold: &flipt.RolloutThreshold{\n\t\t\t\tPercentage: 50.0,\n\t\t\t\tValue: err := s.store.CreateFlag(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateFlagRequest{\n\t\tKey:         t.Name(),\n\t\tName:        \"foo\",\n\t\tDescription: \"bar\",\n\t\tEnabled:     true,\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, flag)\n\n\tsegmentOne, err := s.store.CreateSegment(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateSegmentRequest{\n\t\tKey:       \"segment_one\",\n\t\tName:      \"Segment One\",\n\t\tMatchType: flipt.MatchType_ANY_MATCH_TYPE,\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, segmentOne)\n\n\tsegmentTwo, err := s.store.CreateSegment(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateSegmentRequest{\n\t\tKey:       \"segment_two\",\n\t\tName:      \"Segment Two\",\n\t\tMatchType: flipt.MatchType_ANY_MATCH_TYPE,\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, segmentTwo)\n\n\trollout, err := s.store.CreateRollout(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateRolloutRequest{\n\t\tFlagKey: flag.Key,\n\t\tRank:    1,\n\t\tRule: &flipt.CreateRolloutRequest_Segment{\n\t\t\tSegment: &flipt.RolloutSegment{\n\t\t\t\tValue:           true,\n\t\t\t\tSegmentKey:      \"segment_one\",\n\t\t\t\tSegmentOperator: flipt.SegmentOperator_AND_SEGMENT_OPERATOR,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, rollout)\n\n\tassert.NotZero(t, rollout.Id)\n\tassert.Equal(t, storage.DefaultNamespace, rollout.NamespaceKey)\n\tassert.Equal(t, flag.Key, rollout.FlagKey)\n\tassert.Equal(t, int32(1), rollout.Rank)\n\tassert.Equal(t, flipt.RolloutType_SEGMENT_ROLLOUT_TYPE, rollout.Type)\n\tassert.Equal(t, segmentOne.Key, rollout.GetSegment().SegmentKey)\n\tassert.Equal(t, true, rollout.GetSegment().Value)\n\tassert.NotZero(t, rollout.CreatedAt)\n\tassert.Equal(t, rollout.CreatedAt.Seconds, rollout.UpdatedAt.Seconds)\n\tassert.Equal(t, flipt.SegmentOperator_OR_SEGMENT_OPERATOR, rollout.GetSegment().SegmentOperator)\n\n\tupdated, err := s.store.UpdateRollout(context.TODO(), &flipt.UpdateRolloutRequest{\n\t\tId:          rollout.Id,\n\t\tFlagKey:     rollout.FlagKey,\n\t\tDescription: \"foobar\",\n\t\tRule: &flipt.UpdateRolloutRequest_Segment{\n\t\t\tSegment: &flipt.RolloutSegment{\n\t\t\t\tValue:           false,\n\t\t\t\tSegmentKeys:     []string{segmentOne.Key, segmentTwo.Key},\n\t\t\t\tSegmentOperator: flipt.SegmentOperator_AND_SEGMENT_OPERATOR,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tassert.Equal(t, rollout.Id, updated.Id)\n\tassert.Equal(t, storage.DefaultNamespace, updated.NamespaceKey)\n\tassert.Equal(t, rollout.FlagKey, updated.FlagKey)\n\tassert.Equal(t, \"foobar\", updated.Description)\n\tassert.Equal(t, int32(1), updated.Rank)\n\tassert.Equal(t, flipt.RolloutType_SEGMENT_ROLLOUT_TYPE, updated.Type)\n\tassert.Contains(t, updated.GetSegment().SegmentKeys, segmentOne.Key)\n\tassert.Contains(t, updated.GetSegment().SegmentKeys, segmentTwo.Key)\n\tassert.Equal(t, false, updated.GetSegment().Value)\n\tassert.Equal(t, flipt.SegmentOperator_AND_SEGMENT_OPERATOR, updated.GetSegment().SegmentOperator)\n\tassert.NotZero(t, updated.CreatedAt)\n\tassert.NotZero(t, updated.UpdatedAt)\n}\n\nfunc (s *DBTestSuite) segmentTwo.Key)\n\tassert.Equal(t, true, rollout.GetSegment().Value)\n\tassert.NotZero(t, rollout.CreatedAt)\n\tassert.Equal(t, rollout.CreatedAt.Seconds, rollout.UpdatedAt.Seconds)\n\tassert.Equal(t, flipt.SegmentOperator_AND_SEGMENT_OPERATOR, rollout.GetSegment().SegmentOperator)\n\n\tupdated, err := s.store.UpdateRollout(context.TODO(), &flipt.UpdateRolloutRequest{\n\t\tId:          rollout.Id,\n\t\tFlagKey:     rollout.FlagKey,\n\t\tDescription: \"foobar\",\n\t\tRule: &flipt.UpdateRolloutRequest_Segment{\n\t\t\tSegment: &flipt.RolloutSegment{\n\t\t\t\tValue: rollout.Id, updated.Id)\n\tassert.Equal(t, storage.DefaultNamespace, updated.NamespaceKey)\n\tassert.Equal(t, rollout.FlagKey, updated.FlagKey)\n\tassert.Equal(t, \"foobar\", updated.Description)\n\tassert.Equal(t, int32(1), updated.Rank)\n\tassert.Equal(t, flipt.RolloutType_SEGMENT_ROLLOUT_TYPE, updated.Type)\n\tassert.Equal(t, segmentOne.Key, updated.GetSegment().SegmentKey)\n\tassert.Equal(t, false, updated.GetSegment().Value)\n\tassert.Equal(t, flipt.SegmentOperator_OR_SEGMENT_OPERATOR, updated.GetSegment().SegmentOperator)\n\tassert.NotZero(t, updated.CreatedAt)\n\tassert.NotZero(t, updated.UpdatedAt)\n}\n\nfunc (s *DBTestSuite) TestUpdateRolloutNamespace() {\n\tt := \"bar\",\n\t\tEnabled:      true,\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, flag)\n\n\trollout, err := s.store.CreateRollout(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateRolloutRequest{\n\t\tFlagKey:      flag.Key,\n\t\tNamespaceKey: s.namespace,\n\t\tRank:         1,\n\t\tRule: &flipt.CreateRolloutRequest_Threshold{\n\t\t\tThreshold: &flipt.RolloutThreshold{\n\t\t\t\tValue: rollout.FlagKey,\n\t\tNamespaceKey: s.namespace,\n\t\tDescription:  \"foobar\",\n\t\tRule: &flipt.UpdateRolloutRequest_Threshold{\n\t\t\tThreshold: &flipt.RolloutThreshold{\n\t\t\t\tValue: updated.CreatedAt)\n\tassert.NotZero(t, updated.UpdatedAt)\n}\n\nfunc (s *DBTestSuite) TestUpdateRollout_InvalidType() {\n\tt := s.T()\n\n\tctx := context.TODO()\n\tflag, err := true,\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, flag)\n\n\t_, err = s.store.CreateSegment(ctx, &flipt.CreateSegmentRequest{\n\t\tNamespaceKey: s.namespace,\n\t\tKey:          \"segment_one\",\n\t\tName:         \"Segment One\",\n\t\tMatchType:    flipt.MatchType_ANY_MATCH_TYPE,\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\trollout, err := s.store.CreateRollout(context.TODO(), &flipt.UpdateRolloutRequest_Threshold{\n\t\t\tThreshold: &flipt.RolloutThreshold{\n\t\t\t\tValue:      false,\n\t\t\t\tPercentage: 80,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t})\n\n\trequire.EqualError(t, err, \"cannot change type of rollout: have \\\"SEGMENT_ROLLOUT_TYPE\\\" attempted \\\"THRESHOLD_ROLLOUT_TYPE\\\"\")\n}\n\nfunc (s *DBTestSuite) TestUpdateRollout_NotFound() {\n\tt := s.T()\n\n\tflag, err := found\", s.namespace))\n}\n\nfunc (s *DBTestSuite) TestDeleteRollout() {\n\tt := s.T()\n\n\tflag, err := s.store.CreateFlag(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateFlagRequest{\n\t\tKey:         t.Name(),\n\t\tName:        \"foo\",\n\t\tDescription: \"bar\",\n\t\tEnabled:     true,\n\t\tType:        flipt.FlagType_BOOLEAN_FLAG_TYPE,\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, flag)\n\n\tvar rollouts []*flipt.Rollout\n\n\t// create 3 rollouts\n\tfor i := 0; i < 3; i++ {\n\t\trollout, err := s.store.CreateRollout(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateRolloutRequest{\n\t\t\tFlagKey: flag.Key,\n\t\t\tRank:    int32(i + 1),\n\t\t\tRule: &flipt.CreateRolloutRequest_Threshold{\n\t\t\t\tThreshold: &flipt.RolloutThreshold{\n\t\t\t\t\tValue:      true,\n\t\t\t\t\tPercentage: 40 + float32(i),\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t})\n\n\t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\t\tassert.NotNil(t, rollout)\n\t\trollouts = append(rollouts, rollout)\n\t}\n\n\t// delete second rollout\n\terr = s.store.DeleteRollout(context.TODO(), &flipt.DeleteRolloutRequest{\n\t\tFlagKey: flag.Key,\n\t\tId:      rollouts[1].Id,\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tres, err := s.store.ListRollouts(context.TODO(), storage.ListWithOptions(storage.NewResource(storage.DefaultNamespace, flag.Key)))\n\t// ensure rollouts are in correct order\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tgot := res.Results\n\tassert.NotNil(t, got)\n\tassert.Equal(t, 2, len(got))\n\tassert.Equal(t, rollouts[0].Id, got[0].Id)\n\tassert.Equal(t, int32(1), got[0].Rank)\n\tassert.Equal(t, storage.DefaultNamespace, got[0].NamespaceKey)\n\tassert.Equal(t, rollouts[2].Id, got[1].Id)\n\tassert.Equal(t, int32(2), got[1].Rank)\n\tassert.Equal(t, storage.DefaultNamespace, got[1].NamespaceKey)\n}\n\nfunc (s *DBTestSuite) TestDeleteRolloutNamespace() {\n\tt := s.T()\n\n\tflag, err := s.store.CreateFlag(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateFlagRequest{\n\t\tNamespaceKey: s.namespace,\n\t\tKey:          t.Name(),\n\t\tName:         \"foo\",\n\t\tDescription:  \"bar\",\n\t\tEnabled:      true,\n\t\tType:         flipt.FlagType_BOOLEAN_FLAG_TYPE,\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, flag)\n\n\tvar rollouts []*flipt.Rollout\n\n\t// create 3 rollouts\n\tfor i := 0; i < 3; i++ {\n\t\trollout, err := s.store.CreateRollout(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateRolloutRequest{\n\t\t\tNamespaceKey: s.namespace,\n\t\t\tFlagKey:      flag.Key,\n\t\t\tRank:         int32(i + 1),\n\t\t\tRule: secondSegment.Key)\n\t\tassert.NotZero(t, rollout.CreatedAt)\n\t\tassert.NotZero(t, rollout.UpdatedAt)\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc (s *DBTestSuite) TestListRolloutsNamespace() {\n\tt := s.T()\n\n\tflag, err := t.Name(),\n\t\tName:        \"foo\",\n\t\tDescription: \"bar\",\n\t\tEnabled:     true,\n\t\tType:        flipt.FlagType_BOOLEAN_FLAG_TYPE,\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, &flipt.CreateRolloutRequest_Threshold{\n\t\t\t\tThreshold: &flipt.RolloutThreshold{\n\t\t\t\t\tValue:      true,\n\t\t\t\t\tPercentage: 80.2,\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\tfor _, req := not clearing the DB between tests\n\topts := []storage.QueryOption{storage.WithOrder(storage.OrderDesc), storage.WithLimit(1)}\n\n\tres, err := s.store.ListRollouts(context.TODO(),\n\t\tstorage.ListWithOptions(\n\t\t\tstorage.NewResource(context.TODO(), storage.DefaultNamespace, reqs[1].Rank, got[0].Rank)\n\tassert.NotEmpty(t, res.NextPageToken)\n\n\tpageToken := &common.PageToken{}\n\tpTokenB, err := base64.StdEncoding.DecodeString(res.NextPageToken)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\terr = json.Unmarshal(pTokenB, pageToken)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tassert.NotEmpty(t, pageToken.Key)\n\tassert.Equal(t, uint64(1), pageToken.Offset)\n\n\topts = append(opts, storage.WithPageToken(res.NextPageToken))\n\n\tres, err = s.store.ListRollouts(context.TODO(),\n\t\tstorage.ListWithOptions(\n\t\t\tstorage.NewResource(context.TODO(), storage.DefaultNamespace, flag.Key),\n\t\t\tstorage.ListWithQueryParamOptions[storage.ResourceRequest](opts...),\n\t\t),\n\t)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tgot = res.Results\n\tassert.Len(t, got, 1)\n\tassert.Equal(t, reqs[0].Rank, got[0].Rank)\n}\n\nfunc (s *DBTestSuite) TestCreateRollout_InvalidRolloutType() {\n\tt := s.T()\n\n\t_, err := s.store.CreateRollout(context.TODO(), (s *DBTestSuite) TestCreateRolloutNamespace_FlagNotFound() {\n\tt := s.T()\n\n\t_, err := s.store.CreateRollout(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateRolloutRequest{\n\t\tNamespaceKey:
